subcodes.title: Words to some of the friends, spoken on 1913-12-29
subcodes.first_line: Under what tumultuous times the foundation of this divine structure was laid! Owing to the false reports
subcodes.subjects: @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @Shrines and Holy places
